the intersection between the BB and j agreement

the cop, the, um, what is expected to create mechanisms

synergy between those organizations.

to those individual organizations.

that this agreement will lift the performance of some
of those other organizations.

accountability under the agreement.

to report on certain matters,
and that always improves accountability
and transparency, which can lead
to international pressure if things are not going well.
Um, there is also a dispute settlement body that will, um,
entail binding decisions if there are concerns about
how the states are implementing it.
And there is also an implementation
and compliance committee, which takes a facilitative
and non serial approach to improving compliance.
So overall in relation to other a law of the sea bodies,
this agreement has a reasonable amount of accountability.

source_metadata.description:
Thursday 13 February 2025 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee

International treaty examination of the Agreement Under the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea on the Conservation and Sustainable Use of Marine Biological Diversity of Areas Beyond National Jurisdiction; International treaty examination of the Agreement on Climate Change, Trade and Sustainability
